basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer, Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) Project Engineer / Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Bhilai. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Bhilai Project Engineer / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 45 years of age who have ME/M.Tech/B.Tech/MCA or equivalent in CSE or related areas, B.Tech/B.E./M.Sc/MCA or equivalent degree in CS/CSE/ECE/DS/EEE/EE/IN are eligible to apply for these Project Engineer / Project Assistant vacancies. The online application process for IIT Bhilai Project Engineer /

age_limit.age_details: Max 45 years for Project Engineer, Max 35 years for Project Assistant
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Project Engineer is 45 years. Maximum age limit for Project Assistant is 35 years. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: ME/ MTech/BTech/MCA or equivalent in CSE or related areas, B.Tech / B.E./ M.Sc / MCA or equivalent degree in CS/CSE/ECE/DS/EEE/EE/IN
qualification.details: Project Engineer: ME/ MTech/BTech/MCA or equivalent in CSE or related areas. Desirable: Minimum 2 years of Research experience in computer science or related areas. Project Assistant: B.Tech / B.E./ M.Sc / MCA or equivalent degree in CS/CSE/ECE/DS/EEE/EE/IN. Desirable: Full Stack Web Developers and App Developer: HTML, CSS, MERN Stack, Tailwind CSS, AWS, Redux, Flutter. Embedded Programmer: Coding and hardware implementation on the Arduino, ESP32, Raspberry pi or other development boards.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Bhilai Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Bhilai to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Bhilai recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Bhilai Project Engineer / Project Assistant posts is 20th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Engineer and Project Assistant?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies, with 1 post for Project Engineer and 3 posts for Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Engineer?
faq.answer: For the Project Engineer position, candidates need to have an ME/MTech/BTech/MCA or equivalent degree in CSE or related areas, with a preference for those with at least 2 years of research experience.

faq.question: Q4. What are the desirable skills for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Desirable skills for Project Assistant include expertise in Full Stack Web Development (MERN Stack, Tailwind CSS, AWS, Redux, Flutter) or Embedded Programming (Arduino, ESP32, Raspberry Pi).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for Project Engineer and Project Assistant?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Engineer is 45 years, and for Project Assistant, it is 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary range for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 75,000 per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for IIT Bhilai recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an offline examination followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. In which state is IIT Bhilai located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai is located in Bhilai, Chhattisgarh.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for these government jobs?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of IIT Bhilai or via the direct application link provided in the Important Links section, on or before the last date of application.
